title.en: How 802.1Q Defines Conformance: Components, PICS, and the Bridge Family
title.zh: 802.1Q 如何定义一致性：组件、PICS 与桥接设备家族

blocks.en: Clause 5 of IEEE Std 802.1Q-2022 is the standard's contract: it says exactly what a product must do (and may optionally do) before anyone can honestly claim 'this conforms to 802.1Q.' Rather than describing one monolithic 'bridge,' the standard builds conformance out of small reusable pieces called components, then combines those components into named systems. This lesson walks the first half of Clause 5 (5.1 through 5.19) as a guided map so you can read any conformance line and know which building block it constrains.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.1Q-2022 的第 5 章是整个标准的'合同'：它精确规定了一个产品在能够诚实地宣称'本设备符合 802.1Q'之前必须做什么（以及可以选择性地做什么）。标准并不把'桥'描述成一个庞大的整体，而是用一些可复用的小积木——称为组件（component）——来构建一致性，再把这些组件组合成有名字的系统。本课将引导你走读第 5 章的前半部分（5.1 至 5.19），把它当作一张地图，让你读到任何一行一致性要求时，都能知道它约束的是哪一块积木。

blocks.en: 5.1 Requirements terminology pins down the verbs. 'Shall' means a mandatory requirement; 'may' means a permitted choice (so 'may' and 'may not' mean the same thing — it is simply allowed); 'should' means a recommended but not required choice. The standard also reserves 'is/are' for definitions and logical consequences, 'can' for behavior that is permitted but not directly controlled, 'cannot' for behavior that never occurs in a conformant system, 'allow' as shorthand for 'support the ability for,' and 'capability' to mean 'can be configured to.' Every shall/may/should is mirrored in a Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement (PICS) checklist — Annex A for bridges, Annex B for end stations.
blocks.zh: 5.1 要求术语固定了这些动词的含义。'shall（应）'表示强制要求；'may（可）'表示被允许的选择（所以'may'和'may not'其实是一回事——都只是'被允许'）；'should（宜）'表示推荐但非强制的选择。标准还约定：'is/are'用于定义和逻辑推论，'can'用于被允许但不由实现者直接控制的行为，'cannot'用于在一致性系统中绝不会发生的行为，'allow'是'支持……的能力'的简写，'capability'意为'可被配置为'。每一处 shall/may/should 都会映射到一份协议实现一致性声明（PICS，Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement）清单中——桥接设备见附录 A，端站见附录 B。

blocks.en: 5.2 lists the menu of conformant components and equipment, and 5.3 explains the PICS. The two core components are the VLAN Bridge component (the VLAN-aware engine, defined in 5.4) and the MAC Bridge component (the VLAN-unaware engine, defined in 5.13). On top of those cores sit specialized components — C-VLAN (customer), S-VLAN (service/provider), I-component, B-component, TPMR, T-component — and finally named systems such as the C-VLAN Bridge, Provider Bridge, Backbone Edge Bridge (BEB), MAC Bridge, and TPMR. A claim of conformance (5.3) always names one of these and requires filling out the matching PICS proforma, including any sub-components.
blocks.zh: 5.2 列出了一致性组件与设备的'菜单'，5.3 则解释了 PICS。两个核心组件是：VLAN 桥组件（VLAN-aware 引擎，在 5.4 定义）和 MAC 桥组件（VLAN-unaware 引擎，在 5.13 定义）。在这两个核心之上是各类专用组件——C-VLAN（客户）、S-VLAN（服务/运营商）、I-组件、B-组件、TPMR、T-组件——最后是有名字的系统，如 C-VLAN 桥、运营商桥（Provider Bridge）、骨干边缘桥（BEB，Backbone Edge Bridge）、MAC 桥和 TPMR。一项一致性声明（5.3）总要指明上述其中之一，并要求填写对应的 PICS 表格，包括其所有子组件。

caption.en: The conformance hierarchy of Clause 5: two core engines feed specialized components, which compose into named bridge systems. Each box names the subclause that defines it.
caption.zh: 第 5 章的一致性层级：两个核心引擎向上喂给专用组件，专用组件再组合成有名字的桥接系统。每个方框都标注了定义它的子条款编号。

blocks.en: 5.4 sets the VLAN Bridge component's mandatory floor: conform to the MAC technology at each port (per IEEE Std 802.1AC), support the Enhanced Internal Sublayer Service (EISS), run Type 1 LLC (Logical Link Control), relay/filter frames, support Basic Filtering Services, run Rapid Spanning Tree (RSTP, Clause 13), encode/validate BPDUs (Bridge Protocol Data Units), state its database sizes and rates, support at least one Acceptable Frame Types value, a Port VLAN Identifier (PVID), tag insertion/removal, Multiple VLAN Registration Protocol (MVRP), and at least one Filtering Identifier (FID). 5.4.1 then lists the long optional menu — Multiple Spanning Tree (MST), Connectivity Fault Management (CFM), congestion notification, Multiple MAC Registration Protocol (MMRP), Forwarding and Queuing Enhancements for time-sensitive streams (FQTSS), and more. 5.4.2 is the MVRP requirement, 5.4.3 congestion notification, 5.4.4 Multiple Stream Registration Protocol (MSRP), 5.4.5 Shortest Path Bridging (SPB), and 5.4.6 Path Control and Reservation (PCR).
blocks.zh: 5.4 规定了 VLAN 桥组件的强制底线：每个端口符合相应 MAC 技术（依据 IEEE Std 802.1AC），支持增强型内部子层服务（EISS），运行 Type 1 LLC（逻辑链路控制），中继/过滤帧，支持基本过滤服务，运行快速生成树（RSTP，第 13 章），编码/校验 BPDU（桥协议数据单元），声明其数据库容量与速率，支持至少一种可接受帧类型取值、一个端口 VLAN 标识符（PVID）、标签插入/删除、多 VLAN 注册协议（MVRP），以及至少一个过滤标识符（FID）。5.4.1 随后列出了长长的可选项菜单——多生成树（MST）、连通性故障管理（CFM）、拥塞通知、多 MAC 注册协议（MMRP）、面向时间敏感流的转发与排队增强（FQTSS）等。5.4.2 是 MVRP 要求，5.4.3 是拥塞通知，5.4.4 是多流注册协议（MSRP），5.4.5 是最短路径桥接（SPB），5.4.6 是路径控制与预留（PCR）。

blocks.en: A handy mental model: a C-VLAN component (5.5) is 'a VLAN Bridge component that speaks the customer tag (C-TAG),' and an S-VLAN component (5.6) is 'a VLAN Bridge component that speaks the service tag (S-TAG).' Each 'comprises a single conformant VLAN Bridge component' and then adds tag-specific rules. This 'comprise + add' phrasing is the secret to reading Clause 5: every higher component inherits its base's requirements and layers a few more on top.
blocks.zh: 一个好用的心智模型：C-VLAN 组件（5.5）就是'一个会说客户标签（C-TAG）的 VLAN 桥组件'，而 S-VLAN 组件（5.6）就是'一个会说服务标签（S-TAG）的 VLAN 桥组件'。每一个都'由单个一致的 VLAN 桥组件构成'，然后再加上与标签相关的规则。这种'构成 + 叠加'的措辞是读懂第 5 章的诀窍：每个更高层的组件都继承其基座的要求，再在上面多叠几条。

blocks.en: Walking the family upward: 5.5 C-VLAN must use C-TAGs and the Customer Bridge MVRP address, and must not use S-TAGs except as allowed in 6.13; 5.5.1 lists its options and 5.5.2 adds the optional Traffic Engineering MST Identifier (TE-MSTID). 5.6 S-VLAN must use S-TAGs and the Provider Bridge MVRP address and must not recognize C-TAGs; its sub-parts cover options (5.6.1), Provider Backbone Bridge Traffic Engineering / PBB-TE (5.6.2), PBB-TE Infrastructure Protection Switching / IPS (5.6.3), and ECMP with flow filtering (5.6.4). 5.7 the I-component (interface component) is an S-VLAN component that adds the backbone service instance tag (I-TAG) and maps Service VLAN IDs (S-VIDs) to backbone Service Instance IDs (I-SIDs); 5.7.1 lists its options. 5.8 the B-component (backbone component) is an S-VLAN component that handles I-TAGs on Customer Backbone Ports (CBPs); 5.8.1–5.8.4 cover its options, PBB-TE, PBB-TE IPS, and ECMP-with-flow-filtering requirements.
blocks.zh: 沿着这个家族向上走读：5.5 C-VLAN 必须使用 C-TAG 和客户桥 MVRP 地址，且除 6.13 允许的情况外不得使用 S-TAG；5.5.1 列出其可选项，5.5.2 增加了可选的流量工程 MST 标识符（TE-MSTID）。5.6 S-VLAN 必须使用 S-TAG 和运营商桥 MVRP 地址，且不得识别 C-TAG；其子部分涵盖可选项（5.6.1）、运营商骨干桥流量工程 / PBB-TE（5.6.2）、PBB-TE 基础设施保护倒换 / IPS（5.6.3），以及带流过滤的 ECMP（5.6.4）。5.7 I-组件（接口组件）是在 S-VLAN 组件基础上增加骨干服务实例标签（I-TAG），并把服务 VLAN ID（S-VID）映射到骨干服务实例 ID（I-SID）；5.7.1 列出其可选项。5.8 B-组件（骨干组件）是在 S-VLAN 组件基础上、于客户骨干端口（CBP）处理 I-TAG；5.8.1–5.8.4 涵盖其可选项、PBB-TE、PBB-TE IPS 以及带流过滤的 ECMP 要求。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  A["VLAN Bridge comp 5.4"] --> B["C-VLAN 5.5"]
  A --> C["S-VLAN 5.6"]
  C --> D["I-component 5.7"]
  C --> E["B-component 5.8"]
  B --> F["C-VLAN Bridge 5.9"]
  C --> G["Provider Bridge 5.10"]
  D --> H["BEB 5.12"]
  E --> H
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  A["VLAN 桥组件 5.4"] --> B["C-VLAN 5.5"]
  A --> C["S-VLAN 5.6"]
  C --> D["I-组件 5.7"]
  C --> E["B-组件 5.8"]
  B --> F["C-VLAN 桥 5.9"]
  C --> G["运营商桥 5.10"]
  D --> H["BEB 5.12"]
  E --> H

blocks.en: Now the named systems. 5.9 a C-VLAN Bridge comprises one C-VLAN component, each port able to attach to an IEEE 802 LAN; 5.9.1 says it may take any C-VLAN option. 5.10 a Provider Bridge comprises one S-VLAN component plus zero or more C-VLAN and Port-mapping S-VLAN components, with ports configurable as Provider Network Port (PNP), Customer Network Port (CNP), Customer Edge Port (CEP), or Remote Customer Access Port (RCAP); its two flavors are the S-VLAN Bridge (5.10.1, no CEP/RCAP, no C-VLAN components) and the Provider Edge Bridge (5.10.2, which adds C-VLAN components and Port-mapping S-VLAN components). 5.11 is the system-wide requirement for Priority-based Flow Control (PFC) — enable PFC on at least one priority, process PFC control requests/indications, honor delay constraints, and only enable PFC inside a Data Center Bridging eXchange (DCBX) controlled domain. 5.12 a Backbone Edge Bridge (BEB) comprises I-, B-, and/or T-components with externally accessible ports; 5.12.1 states what a BEB needs for PBB-TE.
blocks.zh: 现在看有名字的系统。5.9 C-VLAN 桥由一个 C-VLAN 组件构成，每个端口都能接入 IEEE 802 局域网；5.9.1 说它可采用任意 C-VLAN 可选项。5.10 运营商桥由一个 S-VLAN 组件外加零或多个 C-VLAN 组件和端口映射 S-VLAN 组件构成，端口可配置为运营商网络端口（PNP）、客户网络端口（CNP）、客户边缘端口（CEP）或远程客户接入端口（RCAP）；它有两种形态：S-VLAN 桥（5.10.1，无 CEP/RCAP、无 C-VLAN 组件）和运营商边缘桥（5.10.2，增加了 C-VLAN 组件和端口映射 S-VLAN 组件）。5.11 是面向整机的基于优先级的流量控制（PFC）要求——至少在一个优先级上启用 PFC，处理 PFC 控制请求/指示，遵守时延约束，且只在受数据中心桥接交换协议（DCBX）控制的域内启用 PFC。5.12 骨干边缘桥（BEB）由 I-、B- 和/或 T-组件加上外部可访问端口构成；5.12.1 规定了 BEB 支持 PBB-TE 所需的内容。

blocks.en: The VLAN-unaware branch mirrors the same pattern. 5.13 the MAC Bridge component is the classic learning bridge: MAC technology conformance, the plain Internal Sublayer Service (ISS, not EISS), Type 1 LLC, Basic Filtering Services, RSTP, BPDU encode/validate, and stated sizes/rates; 5.13.1 lists its options (MMRP, CFM, PFC, scheduled traffic, frame preemption, and the Time-Sensitive Networking add-ons PSFP, CQF, and ATS). 5.14 a MAC Bridge comprises one MAC Bridge component with each port attachable to an IEEE 802 LAN, and 5.14.1 says it may take any MAC Bridge component option. 5.15 a Two-Port MAC Relay (TPMR) component is a MAC Bridge component restricted to exactly two ports that does not run RSTP or BPDUs; 5.15.1 lists its options. 5.16 a TPMR is one TPMR component with two externally accessible ports, and 5.16.1 lists its options. 5.17 a T-component is a TPMR component plus one Provider Instance Port (PIP) handling I-TAGs; 5.17.1 lists its options.
blocks.zh: VLAN-unaware 分支沿用同样的模式。5.13 MAC 桥组件就是经典的学习型桥：MAC 技术一致性、普通的内部子层服务（ISS，而非 EISS）、Type 1 LLC、基本过滤服务、RSTP、BPDU 编码/校验，以及声明容量/速率；5.13.1 列出其可选项（MMRP、CFM、PFC、调度流量、帧抢占，以及时间敏感网络附加功能 PSFP、CQF 和 ATS）。5.14 MAC 桥由一个 MAC 桥组件构成，每个端口都能接入 IEEE 802 局域网；5.14.1 说它可采用任意 MAC 桥组件可选项。5.15 双端口 MAC 中继（TPMR）组件是被限制为恰好两个端口、且不运行 RSTP 或 BPDU 的 MAC 桥组件；5.15.1 列出其可选项。5.16 TPMR 由一个 TPMR 组件加两个外部可访问端口构成；5.16.1 列出其可选项。5.17 T-组件是 TPMR 组件加一个处理 I-TAG 的运营商实例端口（PIP）；5.17.1 列出其可选项。

blocks.en: Finally, Clause 5 leaves room for end stations (the talkers and listeners, not the bridges). 5.18 gives conformance requirements for end stations claiming MMRP, MVRP, or MSRP: 5.18.1 (MMRP), 5.18.2 (MVRP), and 5.18.3 (MSRP) each require running the right Multiple Registration Protocol (MRP) state machines — Applicant, Registrar, LeaveAll, and (for MMRP/MVRP) Periodic Transmission — as one of the defined participant variants (Full, Full point-to-point, Applicant-Only, or Simple-Applicant), and exchanging the protocol's PDUs with the correct group addresses. MSRP notably excludes the Periodic Transmission machine and must not redeclare attributes except on a LeaveAll. 5.19 covers a VLAN-aware end station claiming CFM: it must create Maintenance Domains at eight MD Levels, Maintenance Associations (MAs) per VID, eight Down Maintenance Association Endpoints (MEPs) per VID per port, keep a MEP Continuity Check Message (CCM) database, and follow the Clause 20 state machines and Clause 21 PDU formats.
blocks.zh: 最后，第 5 章也为端站（即发送方与接收方，而非桥）留出了空间。5.18 给出声称支持 MMRP、MVRP 或 MSRP 的端站一致性要求：5.18.1（MMRP）、5.18.2（MVRP）、5.18.3（MSRP）各自要求运行正确的多注册协议（MRP）状态机——Applicant、Registrar、LeaveAll，以及（对 MMRP/MVRP）Periodic Transmission——并作为某种已定义的参与者变体（完整型、完整型点对点子集、仅 Applicant、简单 Applicant），同时用正确的组地址交换该协议的 PDU。值得注意的是，MSRP 排除了 Periodic Transmission 状态机，且除响应 LeaveAll 外不得重新声明其属性。5.19 涵盖声称支持 CFM 的 VLAN-aware 端站：它必须在八个 MD 级别创建维护域、为每个 VID 创建维护关联（MA）、为每端口每 VID 创建八个 Down 维护关联端点（MEP），维护一个 MEP 连续性检查消息（CCM）数据库，并遵循第 20 章状态机和第 21 章 PDU 格式。

summary.en: Coverage map: every Clause 5 unit (5.1–5.19) and where it lives
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：第 5 章每个单元（5.1–5.19）及其归属

blocks.en: Terminology and framing — 5.1 requirements terminology (shall/may/should plus is/can/cannot/allow/capability); 5.2 the menu of conformant components and equipment; 5.3 the PICS proforma (Annex A bridges, Annex B end stations) and what a conformance claim must name. VLAN Bridge core — 5.4 mandatory VLAN Bridge component requirements (802.1AC MAC, EISS, Type 1 LLC, relay/filter, Basic Filtering, RSTP, BPDUs, PVID, MVRP, FID); 5.4.1 options (MST, Port-and-Protocol VLAN, MMRP, CFM, FQTSS, congestion notification, PFC, etc.); 5.4.2 MVRP requirements; 5.4.3 congestion notification; 5.4.4 MSRP; 5.4.5 Shortest Path Bridging (SPB); 5.4.6 Path Control and Reservation (PCR). Specialized VLAN components — 5.5 C-VLAN conformance and 5.5.1 its options, 5.5.2 TE-MSTID; 5.6 S-VLAN conformance, 5.6.1 options, 5.6.2 PBB-TE, 5.6.3 PBB-TE IPS, 5.6.4 ECMP with flow filtering; 5.7 I-component conformance and 5.7.1 options; 5.8 B-component conformance, 5.8.1 options, 5.8.2 PBB-TE, 5.8.3 PBB-TE IPS, 5.8.4 ECMP with flow filtering. Named systems — 5.9 C-VLAN Bridge and 5.9.1 options; 5.10 Provider Bridge with 5.10.1 S-VLAN Bridge and 5.10.2 Provider Edge Bridge; 5.11 system requirements for PFC; 5.12 BEB with 5.12.1 PBB-TE requirements. VLAN-unaware branch — 5.13 MAC Bridge component requirements and 5.13.1 options; 5.14 MAC Bridge conformance and 5.14.1 options; 5.15 TPMR component conformance and 5.15.1 options; 5.16 TPMR conformance and 5.16.1 options; 5.17 T-component conformance and 5.17.1 options. End stations — 5.18 end-station requirements for MMRP/MVRP/MSRP, broken into 5.18.1 MMRP, 5.18.2 MVRP, 5.18.3 MSRP; 5.19 VLAN-aware end-station requirements for CFM.
blocks.zh: 术语与框架——5.1 要求术语（shall/may/should，外加 is/can/cannot/allow/capability）；5.2 一致性组件与设备菜单；5.3 PICS 表格（附录 A 桥、附录 B 端站）以及一致性声明必须指明的内容。VLAN 桥核心——5.4 强制性 VLAN 桥组件要求（802.1AC MAC、EISS、Type 1 LLC、中继/过滤、基本过滤、RSTP、BPDU、PVID、MVRP、FID）；5.4.1 可选项（MST、端口与协议 VLAN、MMRP、CFM、FQTSS、拥塞通知、PFC 等）；5.4.2 MVRP 要求；5.4.3 拥塞通知；5.4.4 MSRP；5.4.5 最短路径桥接（SPB）；5.4.6 路径控制与预留（PCR）。专用 VLAN 组件——5.5 C-VLAN 一致性及 5.5.1 可选项、5.5.2 TE-MSTID；5.6 S-VLAN 一致性、5.6.1 可选项、5.6.2 PBB-TE、5.6.3 PBB-TE IPS、5.6.4 带流过滤的 ECMP；5.7 I-组件一致性及 5.7.1 可选项；5.8 B-组件一致性、5.8.1 可选项、5.8.2 PBB-TE、5.8.3 PBB-TE IPS、5.8.4 带流过滤的 ECMP。有名字的系统——5.9 C-VLAN 桥及 5.9.1 可选项；5.10 运营商桥，含 5.10.1 S-VLAN 桥与 5.10.2 运营商边缘桥；5.11 面向整机的 PFC 要求；5.12 BEB 及 5.12.1 PBB-TE 要求。VLAN-unaware 分支——5.13 MAC 桥组件要求及 5.13.1 可选项；5.14 MAC 桥一致性及 5.14.1 可选项；5.15 TPMR 组件一致性及 5.15.1 可选项；5.16 TPMR 一致性及 5.16.1 可选项；5.17 T-组件一致性及 5.17.1 可选项。端站——5.18 端站对 MMRP/MVRP/MSRP 的要求，细分为 5.18.1 MMRP、5.18.2 MVRP、5.18.3 MSRP；5.19 VLAN-aware 端站对 CFM 的要求。

blocks.en: Reading tip: whenever a subclause says a component 'shall' do something, that line will appear as a mandatory item in the PICS; whenever it says 'may,' it becomes an optional PICS item whose support you tick yes/no. So Clause 5 and the Annex A/B PICS proformas are two views of the same checklist — Clause 5 in prose, the PICS as a fill-in form. Mastering 5.1's verbs is the key that unlocks both.
blocks.zh: 阅读小贴士：每当某子条款说某组件'shall（应）'做某事，这一行就会作为强制项出现在 PICS 中；每当它说'may（可）'，它就成为一个可选 PICS 项，你需要勾选支持与否。因此第 5 章与附录 A/B 的 PICS 表格是同一份清单的两种视图——第 5 章是散文叙述，PICS 是填写表单。掌握 5.1 中的那些动词，就拿到了打开两者的钥匙。

cites.note: Clause 5 Conformance, subclauses 5.1 through 5.19: terminology, components/equipment menu, PICS, VLAN Bridge core and options, C/S-VLAN, I/B-components, named systems (C-VLAN Bridge, Provider Bridge, BEB), MAC Bridge/TPMR/T-component, and end-station requirements for MRP applications and CFM.
